name: eval spec schema: rejects spec with category outside allowed enum (§2.4)
command: echo '{"name":"t","command":"echo hi","setup":[],"expect":{"exit_code":0},"category":"bogus-category"}' > spec.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-eval-spec.sh" spec.json 2>&1 | grep -q "category" && echo ok >&2
